text:
Here is a simple 3 line look at bootup. Sorry about bad message.

It stalls here now:

pcib2: <RockChip RK3568 PCI-express controller> mem 0x3c0800000-0x3c0bfffff,0xfe280000-0xfe28ffff,0xf0000000-0xf00fffff irq 84,85,86,87,88 on ofwbus0
pcib2: Found 3 ranges, nmem=2
